SELECT snowflakeIDToDateTime64(id) AS timestamp FROM test_snowflake;
SELECT snowflakeIDToDateTime64(id, 1288834974657) AS twitter_timestamp FROM test_snowflake;
SELECT snowflakeIDToDateTime64(id, 0, 'UTC') AS utc_timestamp FROM test_snowflake;
SELECT id, snowflakeIDToDateTime64(id, 0, 'America/New_York') AS ny_timestamp FROM test_snowflake WHERE id > 7204436857747984380;
SELECT snowflakeIDToDateTime64(id) AS ms_timestamp FROM test_snowflake WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_snowflake WHERE id < 7204436857747984400);
CREATE TABLE additional_test (id UInt64, ts DateTime64(3));
INSERT INTO additional_test SELECT id, snowflakeIDToDateTime64(id) FROM test_snowflake;
SELECT a.id, a.ts, b.id AS another_id FROM additional_test a JOIN test_snowflake b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.ts > '2023-01-01 00:00:00' ORDER BY a.ts;
SELECT snowflakeIDToDateTime64((SELECT id FROM test_snowflake LIMIT 1)) AS first_timestamp;
SELECT snowflakeIDToDateTime64(id, 0, 'Asia/Tokyo'), COUNT(*) FROM test_snowflake GROUP BY snowflakeIDToDateTime64(id, 0, 'Asia/Tokyo');
SELECT if(snowflakeIDToDateTime64(id) > '2023-01-01 00:00:00', 'Recent', 'Old') AS age_category FROM test_snowflake;
